title: アオハル杯3戦目・次は勝てるもん！

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Oops, we lost! But there's always next
time! I know we'll win the next one!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
We're putting in so much hard work and getting
better every day, so we're bound to win!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I believe in us, so look forward to our next race,
Trainer!
